summary: Freeform text summary of the problems with the inefficiencies or failure modes in the trace: The trace is mostly successful, but it shows weak/no verification because the system extracts words from two arXiv pages and outputs “egalitarian” without explicitly checking the match beyond a superficial textual correspondence (“Utilitarianism vs. Egalitarianism” in one paper and “more egalitarian” in the other).
